shared_foundation_triggers: broken global build or runtime environment
default_stop_conditions: Acceptance criteria are satisfied and verification is green.
A hard blocker, scope violation, or retry-budget exhaustion is reached.
Required approval or artifact is missing.
default_escalation_conditions: Write-surface expansion beyond the approved slice
Repeated failure of the same acceptance criterion

issues.title: Add PRD Tightness Validation Before DAG Compilation
verification_shape: pnpm ops issues pass-fail checks against strong and weak fixture PRDs

waves.rationale: Hard gate for all downstream graph work.

issues.title: Make the DAG the Topologically Sorted Execution Authority
verification_shape: Workflow proof that downstream consumers read DAG authority

waves.rationale: Canonical execution authority must exist before parallel sidecars are safe.

Regenerate DAGs With Diffing, Edit Preservation, and Provenance

Write-surface metadata changes invalidate scheduler assumptions

waves.rationale: Tracer-bullet checkpoint for the execution model.
